scope_boundary: Only the bounded imported external-prototype receipt claim moves to prototype-backed: a clean local Circle checkout at commit 63b0f511 built its Circle Lean target, certified one rope position distinguishability contract, emitted a ready digest and accepted receipt for CC-AI-CONTRACT-ROPE-001, and passed the selected receipt/contract test batch recorded in the tracked public-safe result summary.
transition_reason: The local external Circle checkout at commit 63b0f511 reported a successful lake build of the Circle target, a proved and passed rope certification with mixed_theorem_and_computation assurance and 55 proved theorem IDs, a ready digest for CC-AI-CONTRACT-ROPE-001 with 31 fields, 0 missing fields, and 75 theorems, an accepted receipt requiring theorem IDs AIRA-T0058, AIRA-T0059, AIRA-T0171, AIRA-T0172, AIRA-T0239, AIRA-T0240, and AIRA-T0241 plus recommendation ROPE-USE-D19-MARGIN-FRONTIER, and a selected pytest receipt/contract batch with 145 passing tests. This supports only the narrow public-safe fact that the recorded external prototype receipt slice replayed locally; it does not promote chapter core claims or prove deployed ASI Stack proof-contract transport.
required_artifacts: clean external Circle checkout at recorded commit
rope certification command with required proved/passed status
ready digest command with required recommendation
accepted receipt command with required theorem IDs
negative_results: a first pytest attempt named a missing test path and ran no tests, so it was discarded as procedural non-evidence
a first ready-digest attempt omitted PYTHONPATH=. and failed with ModuleNotFoundError, so only the corrected PYTHONPATH=. run is accepted
the external Circle project is not vendored into this public repository
no chapter core claim is promoted above argument
no model quality, reasoning ability, context length, speed, memory scaling, deployment safety, transfer, ASI, or deployed proof-contract transport claim is made
downgrade_triggers: tracked result no longer records the exact external commit and clean-worktree boundary
tracked result drops the successful Circle build, certification, ready digest, accepted receipt, or pytest receipt batch
receipt fingerprints, theorem requirements, recommendation requirements, or evidence fields drift without a new replay record
the slice is interpreted as model quality, runtime, benchmark, deployment-safety, transfer, ASI, or chapter-core evidence
future public dependency policy requires vendored or externally archived artifacts and this record remains local-summary only
promotion_burden: Broader Circle, proof-carrying-computation, cyclic-memory, RoPE, ASI Stack consumer-gate, or chapter-core claims require separate accepted transitions with public replay artifacts or archived contract packs, exact commands, consumer-gate traces, negative controls where applicable, independent review where relevant, and explicit non-claims.
limitations: local external-project replay summarized in this repository rather than vendored source
one rope position distinguishability contract receipt only
maintainer-agent review only; not an independent external audit
does not prove deployed ASI Stack proof-contract transport
does not prove model quality, reasoning ability, context length, speed, memory scaling, deployment safety, transfer, ASI, benchmark performance, or source interpretation
does not promote any chapter core claim above argument
reviewer_independence: local maintainer-agent review only; not an independent external audit
non_claims: does not promote any chapter core claim
